rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_34th-st-busway, which captures the same project (34th Street SBS) from the same source (201110_brt_34th_cac5). The observation's alias 'corridor_34th-st-manhattan-cac5-2011' is already in the canonical record's aliases. The observation describes the full river-to-river study corridor (First to Twelfth Avenue) while the canonical record's payload focuses on the busway segment (9th-3rd), but they refer to the same 34th Street SBS project identity. Per rules, since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is 'new'.
